grammarNote.title: Time: Past and Future
grammarNote.explanation:
C'est l'enfance d'Avril. — childhood. L'avenir est dans le labo. — the future. This chapter looks backward AND forward.

Notice the time vocabulary: enfance (childhood), avenir (future), semaine (week). Time stretches in both directions.

Re-read and sort the sentences: which describe the past, which describe the future, which describe now?
